# AI Readiness Report: idealista.com

**Generated by CrawlReady** | https://crawlready.dev
**Date**: 27 March 2026
**Overall Grade**: D (36/100)

---

## Executive Summary

idealista.com — Spain's leading real estate portal — scores a **D (36/100)** in AI readiness. While the site is fast and secure, it is largely **invisible to AI agents** like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Mode, and Claude.

With 93% of AI search sessions ending without visiting a website, and AI-powered property search becoming the norm, this represents a significant risk to organic traffic and lead generation.

---

## Critical Issues & Recommendations

### 1. No llms.txt (Impact: HIGH)
llms.txt is the emerging standard for communicating with LLMs — think of it as robots.txt for AI agents. Without it, AI agents have no structured guide to your site's content.

**Recommendation**: Create a `/llms.txt` file describing Idealista's key sections (property listings, price tools, neighborhood guides, mortgage calculator), APIs, and data. See [llmstxt.org](https://llmstxt.org) for the spec.

### 2. No Structured Data (Impact: CRITICAL)
This is the single biggest issue. Without JSON-LD/Schema.org markup, AI agents cannot understand that idealista.com is a real estate platform, what properties are listed, prices, locations, or features.

**Recommendation**: Implement JSON-LD for:
- `Organization` — Idealista as a business
- `WebSite` with `SearchAction` — enable AI agents to understand search functionality
- `RealEstateListing` / `Product` — on individual property pages
- `BreadcrumbList` — site navigation structure
- `FAQPage` — on help/guide sections

### 3. Incomplete Meta Tags (Impact: HIGH)
Missing meta description, Open Graph tags, and canonical URL. When AI agents summarize or cite idealista.com, they have almost nothing to work with.

**Recommendation**: Add on every page:
- `<meta name="description">` with 50-160 char descriptions
- Full Open Graph tags (og:title, og:description, og:image, og:type)
- `<link rel="canonical">` for URL normalization

### 4. No Sitemap (Impact: MEDIUM)
Without a sitemap.xml, AI crawlers must discover pages through links alone. For a site with potentially millions of property listings, this is very inefficient.

**Recommendation**: Generate and maintain a comprehensive sitemap.xml (or sitemap index) covering all active property listings, location pages, and editorial content.

### 5. No Explicit AI Crawler Configuration (Impact: MEDIUM)
No robots.txt means AI bots can access everything by default — but there's no control over what they prioritize or ignore.

**Recommendation**: Create a robots.txt that:
- Explicitly `Allow` GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended
- Sets appropriate crawl-delay if needed
- Points to the sitemap: `Sitemap: https://www.idealista.com/sitemap.xml`
